mapper.insert: INSERT INTO survey_event(form_id, user_id, event_type) VALUES (#{formId}, #{userId}, #{eventType})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'view')::int AS "viewCount", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'start')::int AS "startCount", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'submit')::int AS "submitCount" FROM survey_event WHERE form_id = #{formId}
